overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk through the Arasaka Memorial. The player character moves from a red-lit corporate corridor through teal neon walkways and dark utility passages into a vast memorial hall featuring holographic koi fish and stone monuments commemorating the 2023 bombing.

events.description: approaching doorway leading from red corridor to teal-lit walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through red-lit corridor passing by glass-walled office spaces

notable_agents.action: person standing in side office visible through glass partition

entered.detail: smooth wall surface with red ambient lighting reflecting off polished surfaces
large vertical screen displaying abstract red and white patterns
transparent walls separating main corridor from adjacent office rooms

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow corridor bathed in red light with digital displays on the left wall. The player walks forward past glass-partitioned offices where a few NPCs are visible, approaching a doorway that leads to a differently lit area.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated glass walkway with teal neon lighting

events.description: dramatic shift from red to teal-cyan lighting upon entering glass walkway
glass floor sections reveal debris and ruins in the level below

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated glass walkway with slight ascent on ramp

notable_agents.action: person in white clothing walking ahead on the glass walkway
visitor taking photographs with phone near the glass wall

entered.detail: transparent glass walls on both sides of the elevated corridor
continuous horizontal cyan light fixtures running along wall edges
sleek metal handrails along the glass walls

segments.scene_description: Transitioning into a teal-lit glass walkway, the environment shifts to a cooler color palette with transparent walls revealing the structure below. The player passes other pedestrians including someone taking photos, while walking over glass sections that show debris beneath.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark industrial maintenance corridor with debris below

events.description: lighting dims significantly entering darker utility corridor section
passing illuminated ESOS sign and viewing debris field through floor

agents.ego_description: walking through darker corridor with metal grating floor and industrial aesthetics

entered.detail: illuminated sign with hexagon logo and ESOS text on dark wall
rubble and destroyed structural elements visible through glass floor panels
exposed metal piping and ductwork on ceiling

segments.scene_description: The corridor becomes darker and more industrial with metal grating floors revealing debris below. The player passes an illuminated ESOS emergency sign and continues through the utilitarian passage toward a bright exit in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: Arasaka Memorial hall with holographic displays and stone monuments

events.description: exiting narrow corridor into expansive memorial hall with high ceilings
holographic koi fish swimming above the memorial stone monuments

agents.ego_description: walking through the vast memorial space observing monuments and holographic displays

notable_agents.action: visitor taking photographs of the stone memorial monuments
group of visitors gathered near the Arasaka Memorial sign

entered.detail: large illuminated cyan sign reading 2023 ARASAKA MEMORIAL WE SHALL NEVER FORGET
tall rectangular stone structures with engraved patterns arranged in rows
giant orange and white holographic fish swimming through the air above the memorial
glowing white linear lights embedded in the black reflective floor marking pathways

segments.scene_description: The scene opens dramatically into a vast memorial hall with towering stone monuments and glowing floor lines. The player explores the space where holographic koi fish swim overhead and visitors gather near the illuminated Arasaka Memorial 2023 sign, creating a solemn yet futuristic atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a claustrophobic corporate corridor into a vast, ethereal memorial hall. It begins in a narrow hallway bathed in red light, moving past digital displays and glass-partitioned offices toward a doorway. As the camera crosses the threshold, the environment shifts to a cooler teal palette along a glass walkway where pedestrians pass over transparent floors revealing debris below. The scene then transitions into a darker, industrial utility passage with metal grating and illuminated emergency signs before moving toward a bright exit. Finally, the space opens dramatically into a towering memorial hall featuring stone monuments, glowing floor lines, and holographic koi fish swimming overhead beneath a solemn Arasaka sign.
